title: Case/Care Management * Hard of Hearing - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Case/Care Management * Hard of Hearing 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Deafness Disabilities Issues Hard of Hearing Older Adults Hispanic/Latino Community Immigrants Refugees/Entrants/Asylees Homeless Veterans Veterans Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES OREGON DEAF AND HARD OF HEARING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon Deaf and Hard of Hearing Services (ODHHS) is a resource to improve quality of life for deaf and hard of hearing people and their families. Helps to make state services and programs welcoming and accessible, improve the user experience, and works with agencies to offer advice, resources, tools, and information. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Deaf or hard of hearing individulas and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (855) 503-7233 () Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES OREGON DEAF AND HARD OF HEARING SERVICES
